metadata.expected_sequence: create-skill -> evaluate-skill -> improve-skill -> package only after approval

criteria.question: Does the response sequence Create Skill, Evaluate Skill, and Improve Skill in the right order?
Does each lane handoff cite concrete artifacts such as `SKILL.md`, `.meta-skill/eval-scenarios.md`, eval folders, run IDs, response.md, transcript.json, and review.md?
Does package remain a later explicit approval gate rather than an automatic action?
Does the response avoid stale commands or surfaces such as report, plan, promote, decide, `.meta-skill/reviews/`, `Judge Score`, or `Total Score`?
Does the response distinguish authored evals, completed runs, deterministic tests, and quality proof instead of overclaiming?
